items.html: Blender 5.2 RC drops today with a new scene project brush and sculpting refinements — download and test before the stable release locks in your pipeline.
Apple is suing OpenAI, alleging senior leaders including hardware chief Tang Tan directed a pattern of trade secret theft involving confidential project codes and unreleased hardware details.
Meta killed a week-old Instagram AI tool that let anyone generate deepfakes of public accounts by tagging them — the feature had no consent or owner notification.
New INT4 W4A4 quantization hits near-INT8 image quality at lower VRAM and smaller file size in ComfyUI — worth swapping into your local generation stack now.
Hugging Face CEO says enterprises are switching from paid AI APIs to open-source models at scale — review your toolchain costs before your clients ask why you haven't.
A free open-source browser-based procedural ivy and fig tree generator launched, letting 3D environment artists paint organic foliage paths onto meshes in real time.

brief.title: Monday, July 13 — six things creators need to know

tooldrop.name: MuScriptor
tooldrop.blurb: Open-weight model from Kyutai that transcribes multi-instrument audio recordings into MIDI. Useful for musicians who want to extract notation or stems from existing tracks.

stories.title: Blender 5.2 release candidate adds new sculpting brush tools
stories.dek: Blender 5.2 RC introduces scene project brush and sculpting refinements. Solid tooling update for 3D artists.

stories.title: 3D artist creates Wolverine in comic book toon shader style
stories.dek: Tian Jin and Vincent Ménier demonstrate deliberate shader control to achieve stylized comic aesthetic in Blender. Strong technical execution and distinctive visual point of view.

stories.title: Game artist Jenny Mati details multi-tool workflow for scene composition
stories.dek: Creator walks through practical pipeline: Maya base, sketch, V-Ray rendering, and post-work for depth and atmosphere. Concrete technique.

stories.title: Indie team films live-action reference for cinematic platformer Deer & Boy
stories.dek: Developers of Deer & Boy use practical motion reference to animate character movement. Shows deliberate craft and technical discipline in animation workflow.

stories.title: Apple's scrapped self-driving car seeded Neural Engine AI chip architecture
stories.dek: Failed autonomous vehicle project led to development of on-device AI processing capabilities that became core to Apple Silicon's performance.
